title: Sharing PhD Study and Scholarship Application Experiences
Sharing PhD Study and Scholarship Application Experiences
text:
Overview
This talk was delivered as an invited session for graduate students at the School of Public Health (Shenzhen), Sun Yat-sen University. It covers practical experiences and reflections on:

Navigating a PhD program in epidemiology and biostatistics
Applying for domestic and international scholarships
Balancing research, coursework, and personal growth
Lessons learned from the publication process

title: Sharing PhD Study and Scholarship Application Experiences
text:
About the Speaker
Zhen Lu is a PhD in Epidemiology and Biostatistics from Sun Yat-sen University. His research combines clinical epidemiology, biostatistics, and machine learning to address questions in infectious diseases, HPV infection, and cervical cancer prevention. He also maintains open-source tools for biostatistics and founded Biostat Weekly.
